title: Prove router and firewall ingress boundary
goal: Produce a current end-to-end ingress proof for Heim-PC covering router port forwarding, UPnP/PCP mappings, host nftables/iptables/firewalld policy, Tailscale exposure and externally reachable services without inferring safety from local listeners alone.

acceptance.assertion: Current router forwarding and UPnP/PCP state is read from an authenticated primary source or remains explicitly UNVERIFIED with the missing access named.
Current nftables/iptables/firewalld/UFW policy and effective default/input rules are captured with bounded redacted evidence.
Tailscale Serve/Funnel and tailnet listener state are captured separately from LAN and public ingress.
A bounded external-network probe tests only explicitly listed expected ports and records source, target and timestamp; absence of response is not overstated as universal proof.
Infra runtime records the proven boundary and retains UNVERIFIED for every unsupported edge claim.

metadata.reason: T004 classified listeners but deliberately did not prove router forwarding, complete firewall policy or categorical public-ingress absence.
